channel.title: Easter Triduum
channel.description: A three-day Easter series for the family. Good Friday, Holy Saturday, Easter Sunday — the story told simply and seriously.
channel.itunes:author: Andres
channel.itunes:summary: A three-day Easter series for the family. Good Friday, Holy Saturday, Easter Sunday — the story told simply and seriously.

item.title: Good Friday — The Passion
item.description: Francisco, Sebastian — today is Good Friday. It is the most solemn day in the Christian calendar. And I want to tell you what happened, because the story itself deserves to be heard.

item.title: Holy Saturday — The Silence
item.description: Francisco, Sebastian — today is Holy Saturday. It is the strangest day of the year. Nothing happens. And that is the whole point.

item.title: Easter Sunday — The Resurrection
item.description: Francisco, Sebastian — it is Sunday morning. And the story turns.
